meaning: n.(墨西哥)麦斯卡尔酒,[植]龙舌兰,[植]威廉斯仙人球
examples: Mescal San Cosme is the link between past and present.
The blue maguey is used to make both tequila and mescal.
San Cosme is a mescal made in Mexico and imported to Germany.
Tequilas, mescal, well-made cocktails, traditional-style hibiscus water and a choice of Mexican beer can accompany all of the above.
No drink is more Mexican than pulque, not even tequila or mescal.
